title: Nvidia GPUs Vulnerable to Rowhammer Attacks
summary: New attacks exploit GPU memory to hijack CPUs. GDDRHammer, GeForge, and GPUBreach give attackers complete control.
body:
Researchers have discovered new Rowhammer attacks, dubbed GDDRHammer, GeForge, and GPUBreach, which target Nvidia GPUs. These attacks exploit vulnerabilities in GPU memory to gain control of the CPU, potentially allowing malicious actors to access sensitive information. 

 The implications of these attacks are significant, as they could be used to compromise the security of machines running Nvidia GPUs. This is particularly concerning for industries that rely heavily on GPU-accelerated computing, such as gaming, scientific research, and artificial intelligence. 

 The discovery of these attacks has sparked concerns about the security of GPU memory and the need for manufacturers to implement robust security measures. As the use of GPUs continues to grow, it is essential to address these vulnerabilities to prevent potential attacks. Reactions from Nvidia and the broader industry are expected, with potential patches and security updates on the horizon.
twitterThread: 🚨 Breaking: New Rowhammer attacks give attackers complete control of machines running Nvidia GPUs! 🚨
Here's why this matters: GDDRHammer, GeForge, and GPUBreach exploit GPU memory to hijack CPUs. The implications are huge.
The wild part: these attacks can be used to compromise the security of machines in various industries, from gaming to scientific research.
Let that sink in: if your machine is running an Nvidia GPU, it may be vulnerable to these attacks. This changes everything for GPU-accelerated computing.
This is a wake-up call for the industry. Manufacturers need to prioritize security and implement robust measures to prevent such attacks.
standaloneTweet: Nvidia GPUs vulnerable to new Rowhammer attacks! GDDRHammer, GeForge, and GPUBreach give attackers complete control. Read more: https://ainformed.dev/articles/new-rowhammer-attacks-give-complete-control-of-machines-running-nvidia-gpus
